allow: PowerShell($vswhere = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\Installer\\vswhere.exe"; if \(Test-Path $vswhere\) { & $vswhere -all -format json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object installationVersion, installationPath, displayName } else { "vswhere not found" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "Устанавливаю Go..."; Start-Process msiexec.exe -ArgumentList "/i `"$env:TEMP\\sborka-install\\go-installer.msi`" /quiet /norestart" -Wait -Verb RunAs; Write-Host "Go установлен")

PowerShell(Write-Host "Скачиваю VS Build Tools \(~5 MB bootstrapper\)..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vs_buildtools.exe" -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\sborka-install\\vs_buildtools.exe" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Скачан: $\(\(Get-Item "$env:TEMP\\sborka-install\\vs_buildtools.exe"\).Length / 1KB -as [int]\) KB")

PowerShell(Write-Host "Устанавливаю MSVC Build Tools \(C++ workload\) — это займёт 5-15 минут..."; Start-Process "$env:TEMP\\sborka-install\\vs_buildtools.exe" -ArgumentList "--quiet --wait --norestart --add Microsoft.VisualStudio.Workload.VCTools --includeRecommended" -Wait -Verb RunAs; Write-Host "MSVC Build Tools установлены")

PowerShell($vswhere = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\Installer\\vswhere.exe"; & $vswhere -all -format json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object installationVersion, displayName, installationPath)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;C:\\Program Files\\Go\\bin;" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "User"\); cd "C:\\Users\\flipgod\\Desktop\\sborka-zvukov"; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\build-sidecar.ps1 2>&1)

PowerShell($wv2 = Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\WOW6432Node\\Microsoft\\EdgeUpdate\\Clients\\{F3017226-FE2A-4295-8BDF-00C3A9A7E4C5}" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($wv2\) { Write-Host "WebView2: $\($wv2.pv\)" } else { $wv2u = Get-ItemProperty "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\EdgeUpdate\\Clients\\{F3017226-FE2A-4295-8BDF-00C3A9A7E4C5}" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($wv2u\) { Write-Host "WebView2 \(user\): $\($wv2u.pv\)" } else { Write-Host "WebView2 not found — Tauri won't run without it" } })
